title: Full-Text Search with Faceting
instruction: Plan the integration of full-text search across Product entities. Requirements: search by name, description, and tags; faceted filtering by category and price range; pagination; results ranked by relevance score; sub-200ms p99 latency at 10k products. Technology choice (PostgreSQL FTS vs Elasticsearch vs Typesense) must be justified in an ADR.
codebase_context:
```
# Django 5 + PostgreSQL 16
app/
  products/
    models.py    # Product: id, name, description, price, category FK, tags M2M
    views.py     # ListAPIView with basic icontains filter
    serializers.py
  categories/
    models.py    # Category: id, name, parent FK (tree)
```
